summary: The ClawSweeper commit finding is still valid on current main 5e1fbca3cbc60b1a4d4fa8c937dad22b826899b6. The deprecated Discord SDK facade still advertises optional cfg and legacy id/channel_id result fields while the wrapped runtime requires cfg and returns normalized messageId/channelId. Plan one narrow credited fix PR; no close or merge actions are allowed for this job.
